failure_mode: callback-source provenance overridden by completed downstream controls
root_cause: HoloGov treated completed AP signoff, vendor-master audit, elevated-scrutiny routing, cross-reference checks, and hold release as sufficient, while underweighting the controlling field CALLSYS-771904.number_source. The callback was sourced from PORTAL-CHG-7K2Q9 submitted_contact_phone rather than the pre-change vendor-master snapshot, so the downstream controls did not cure the noncompliant callback provenance.
evidence_hologov_overweighted: HoloGov controlling_reason said all required controls were satisfied, including verification of the payment account change and hold release.
HoloGov cited AP-SIGNOFF-BTP-5540, VM-AUDIT-BTP-63D2, ESR-BTP-2024-11, IPR-BTP-4421, VM-HOLD-BTP-2024-11, and PO-BTP-2024-44 as clearance evidence.
HoloGov followed the Gemini and MiniMax completed-controls framing rather than Grok's specific callback-source objection.
evidence_hologov_underweighted: AP-POL-2024-017 requires callback contact source to be pre-existing vendor-master data rather than a number supplied in the change request or invoice.
correct_rule: When a callback record's number_source names portal_change_record, change_request, invoice, submitted_contact_phone, or another newly supplied contact source, callback provenance is noncompliant and remains a material blocker. Completed signoff, vendor-master audit, elevated-scrutiny routing, invoice cross-reference checks, and hold release do not override that blocker. The ALLOW sibling remains protected when number_source names a pre-change vendor-master snapshot and the dialed number matches the pre-change phone_on_file.

recommended_patch.summary: Strengthen the BEC analyst and Governor callback-provenance rubric so CALLSYS.number_source is treated as a decisive field-level gate. Explicitly state that portal/change-request/invoice/submitted-contact number_source values override otherwise completed downstream controls.

regression_requirement: Add a non-live static regression test that fails if the prompt/rubric no longer says that a callback number_source naming portal_change_record, change_request, invoice, submitted_contact_phone, or newly supplied contact is a material blocker that completed downstream controls cannot cure.
